title: Perform mechanical cutting
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform mechanical cutting demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work

pcs.text: Identify job requirements and specifications from work order and drawings1.2 Select appropriate cutting equipment, inspecting for safe operation and identifying faults 1.3 Set and adjust cutting equipment for use, according to material type and job specifications1.4 Identify cutting list from work plan and plan cutting processes to ensure minimal waste
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements and specifications from work order and drawings1.2 Select appropriate cutting equipment, inspecting for safe operation and identifying faults 1.3 Set and adjust cutting equipment for use, according to material type and job specifications1.4 Identify cutting list from work plan and plan cutting processes to ensure minimal waste?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job requirements and specifications from work order and drawings1.2 Select appropriate cutting equipment, inspecting for safe operation and identifying faults 1.3 Set and adjust cutting equipment for use, according to material type and job specifications1.4 Identify cutting list from work plan and plan cutting processes to ensure minimal waste.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for work

elements.title: Undertake cutting processes

pcs.text: Identify and use personal protective equipment (PPE) according to workplace procedures and work health and safety (WHS) requirements2.2 Check equipment safety stops and guards, adjusting if necessary2.3 Operate equipment according to manufacturer instructions and workplace procedures2.4 Inspect and cut material according to job specifications2.5 Identify cutting defects and take corrective action
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and use personal protective equipment (PPE) according to workplace procedures and work health and safety (WHS) requirements2.2 Check equipment safety stops and guards, adjusting if necessary2.3 Operate equipment according to manufacturer instructions and workplace procedures2.4 Inspect and cut material according to job specifications2.5 Identify cutting defects and take corrective action?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and use personal protective equipment (PPE) according to workplace procedures and work health and safety (WHS) requirements2.2 Check equipment safety stops and guards, adjusting if necessary2.3 Operate equipment according to manufacturer instructions and workplace procedures2.4 Inspect and cut material according to job specifications2.5 Identify cutting defects and take corrective action.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Undertake cutting processes

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Clean and maintain work area and equipment according to workplace procedures3.2 Identify, tag and report faulty cutting equipment3.3 Complete cutting list and give to appropriate personnel

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and maintain work area and equipment according to workplace procedures3.2 Identify, tag and report faulty cutting equipment3.3 Complete cutting list and give to appropriate personnel.
